recommendations.text: URGENT packaging fix: copilot_sdk_driver.cjs requires 'minimatch' at runtime (copilot_sdk_driver.cjs:42) but the module is not bundled/installed in the action's node_modules, so it throws MODULE_NOT_FOUND and every retry fails. Either (a) bundle minimatch into the sdk-driver build / add it to the action's dependencies, or (b) inline-vendor the glob matching it needs. This single bug killed 6 distinct copilot workflows (Linter Miner, Daily Secrets Analysis Agent, PR Code Quality Reviewer x2, Daily Testify Uber Super Expert, PR Triage Agent) with 0 useful work. Add a CI smoke test that node-requires the built sdk-driver to catch missing deps before release.

Make the detection (prompt-injection scan) result parser tolerant of a missing THREAT_DETECTION_RESULT marker: when continue-on-error=true and the marker is absent, treat as 'no threat detected / inconclusive' and exit non-red instead of ERR_PARSE failing the detection job (which reddens the whole run even though the agent succeeded). Optionally retry the detection prompt once. Seen on Design Decision Gate 27065879421.

Add a model/param preflight validation at compile or activation time: (1) reject or warn when an engine config pins a model that does not exist at the provider endpoint (e.g. codex 'adelie-alpha-2026-02-19' -> 404); (2) reject or strip params the chosen model does not support (e.g. 'effort'/reasoning-effort on a claude model that returns 400 'does not support the effort parameter'). These currently waste an entire prod-main scheduled run (all retries exhausted, 0 tokens) on what is a static config error. Audit Daily Caveman Optimizer and Daily Cache Strategy Analyzer frontmatter for stale model ids/params.

Add a soft pre-cap guard for heavy daily-aggregation workflows (Daily Ambient Context Optimizer ran 25.37M eff this window, OVER the 25M cap, and only narrowly succeeded): chunk/stream the context or set a 22-23M effective-token ceiling that triggers graceful summarization before hitting the hard 25M 429. #35661.

Make the safe_outputs job tolerant of per-item failures: when the agent succeeded and >=1 item landed, exit non-red with a partial-success summary instead of failing the whole job on a single rejected item. RECUR 2026-06-06 (PR Sous Chef sub_agent_error reddened the job after a 34-turn successful agent run).
For add_comment with target='*', require/inject item_number at emit-time or give the agent a clearer schema hint. Not triggered 2026-06-05 but fix not yet shipped.

Fix copilot-sdk-driver tool-permission mapping: the sdk-driver denies shell(ls/cat) and read on /tmp/gh-aw/cache-memory that the workflow legitimately configures, aborting after 5 denials. Reconcile the 23 allow-tool entries derived from GH_AW_COPILOT_SDK_SERVER_ARGS with the workflow's declared tools so legitimate cache-memory/read access is granted. RE-ESCALATED 2026-06-06: 3 prod-main schedules (Daily SPDD Spec Planner permDenied=10, GEO Optimizer, Daily Safe Output Integrator).

Investigate why Test Quality Sentinel [copilot] reddened the agent job despite producing a complete valid agent_output report (27 turns, no crash, error_count=0). Capture full harness stdio (the log appeared truncated to report markdown) to isolate the nonzero exit. Distinguish from the copilot-sdk-driver class.
Add label + temporary_id support to the create_discussion safe-output surface (re-requested by Smoke Copilot probe 2026-06-05).
